top_signals.title: India’s Nayara Completes Maintenance at 400,000-Bpd Refinery
top_signals.summary: India’s Nayara Energy, which processes Russian oil, has completed a planned turnaround of its 400,000-barrels-per-day refinery at Vadinar, the Indian refiner said on Thursday. Nayara Energy, in which Rosneft holds 49% and which has been processing only Russian oil for months after the EU sanctions on the company, could boost fuel supply to the Indian market in the coming weeks. The refiner has pivoted to supply the domestic market to avoid the EU sanctions from the summer of 2025 on Nayara Energy because of the Russian ownership. Apart from…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘The low is almost in’: Standard Chartered says bitcoin bottom near after tough week for crypto
top_signals.summary: Standard Chartered said bitcoin's low is "almost in," citing resilient ETF holdings and likely Strategy buybacks after a painful week for crypto.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Indian Owner of Swiss Gold Refiner Probed for $159 Billion of Inflated Revenue
top_signals.summary: India’s markets regulator has alleged that the owner of Swiss gold refiner Valcambi SA overstated revenue, according to an interim order issued Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Modernising money and markets − speech by Sarah Breeden
Arm’s $218 Billion Leap Makes It One of Market’s Priciest Stocks
top_signals.summary: Arm Holdings Plc has been a relatively expensive stock for investors to own since the company first issued American depositary receipts in 2023. But a wild surge that has nearly doubled the share price in a matter of weeks is pushing the valuation to levels investors rarely see.

top_signals.title: Polymarket’s UMA vote upholds ‘No’ outcome on Strategy bitcoin sale market despite backlash
top_signals.summary: The dispute centers on Strategy's disclosure that it sold 32 BTC for roughly $2.5 million between May 26 and May 31.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Police dismantles 9 crime groups in illegal streaming crackdown
top_signals.summary: European and international law enforcement agencies have dismantled nine organized crime groups and arrested 29 suspects in a major crackdown on illegal streaming operations. [...]
